translations.en: a strong, sinewy woman with a hard look about her.
translations.zh: 身強體健的女子，眼神剛毅。

translations.en: "Smell that salt air, friend. Brings a tear to me eye..."
translations.zh: 「聞聞那鹹海風，朋友，讓我眼眶泛濕……」

translations.en: "Welcome, welcome!" She slaps you heartily on the back.
translations.zh: 「歡迎，歡迎！」她用力拍了拍你的背。

translations.en: "@Fentrissa."
"A strong name, as strong as the @sea." She looks into the distance.
translations.zh: 「響亮的名字，如同@sea（海）一般強勁。」她遠眺天際。

translations.en: "Beautiful thing, but a @jealous man he is."
translations.zh: 「美麗之物，卻是個@jealous（善妒）的傢伙。」
translations.note: 她稱海為 he（男性），下文有人物回應

translations.en: "Many call her a female."
"If ya ask me, men are much more unpredictable."
"You bought my last craft."
"I sell
translations.note: 句子開頭，與後面部分拼接

translations.en: @ships."
@skiffs."
@ships and @skiffs."
"Sorry, I sold you my last one."
"I'm out of work after selling you all my ships and skiffs."
translations.zh: 「把船和小艇都賣給你後，我就沒活幹了。」

translations.en: "I have @ships for sale, but I sold you my last @skiff."
translations.zh: 「我有@ships（帆船）可賣，但最後一艘@skiff（小艇）已賣給你了。」

translations.en: "I sold you my last @ship, but I still have some @skiffs left."
translations.zh: 「最後一艘@ship（船）已賣給你了，但還有幾艘@skiffs（小艇）。」

translations.en: "I sell @ships and @skiffs."
"Have a good one." She bows, hands on her hips.
"Ask around."
$N turns to $Y, "It'll cost you #4 gold for the deed. Interested?"
translations.zh: $N轉向$Y：「這份船契要#4枚金幣。有意嗎？」

translations.en: $N looks at $Y. "You look pretty full to me."
translations.zh: $N看了看$Y：「你好像裝得滿滿的了。」

translations.en: "Excellent!" After accepting the gold, $N hands $Y the deed.
translations.zh: 「好極了！」$N收下金幣，將船契遞給$Y。

translations.en: "Sail her straight."
"You'll ne'er find a better craft."
"Your party hasn't enough money."
"It looks like you're #1 gold piece\s short."
"Sorry."
Your party takes up a collection for the deed.
translations.zh: 你們一起湊錢買下了船契。

translator_notes: Fentrissa 賣船女商人，豪邁海員氣息。ship → 帆船，skiff → 小艇，deed → 船契。
